larena/access.boundary: Access owns grant decisions and access.operation.denied; Content does not duplicate Access denials.

larena/audit.boundary: Content emits redacted descriptors and payloads through the connection-bound owner pipeline inside the caller transaction.

larena/core.boundary: No Content runtime table or service is delegated to Core in this batch.

larena/dataview.boundary: Content supplies request-local scalar presentation rows after Access-scoped listing; Dataview owns no canonical records and exposes no mutation.

larena/filesystem.boundary: Content stores logical references and consumes only the safe inspection allowlist; it does not upload, mutate, delete, sign or publish blobs.

larena/layout.boundary: No Layout runtime or presentation ownership is introduced by this backend batch.

larena/licensing.boundary: No license or entitlement decision is implemented in Content.

larena/property.boundary: Content maps frozen exact Property versions and performs owner-compatible preflight; Property and Storage remain authoritative for typed normalization.

larena/search.role: search index and reindex protocol owner
larena/search.boundary: Content produces the content.published_items projection from the same fail-closed public reader; Search owns index records and tombstones.

larena/storage.role: typed value and immutable record owner
larena/storage.boundary: Storage owns typed values and immutable versions. Content stores only exact owner references and independently verifies returned identity, schema, revision, actor and correlation metadata.

larena/ui.boundary: No admin UI, frontend component or asset behavior is introduced by this backend batch.
